intro: Guibourtia ehie, also known as Afronolletia ehie, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in tropical forests of West Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
